headline: Why Carlisle (CSL) Shares Are Falling Today
summary: Shares of building envelope solutions provider Carlisle Companies (NYSE:CSL) fell 4.2% in the morning session after Truist Securities lowered its price target on the stock due to concerns about rising costs and supply chain issues.

raw.headline: Why Carlisle (CSL) Shares Are Falling Today

headline: Amrize shares tumble as Truist downgrades on roofing pressures and cement pricing
summary: Investing.com -- Amrize shares have fallen by more than 6% on Tuesday after Truist downgraded the building materials company to Hold from Buy and cut its price target to $48 from $65, citing margin pressures in commercial roofing and limited near-term cement pricing upside.

headline: Truist Financial (TFC) Joins Defensive Indexes, Is The Stock Still Undervalued?
summary: Truist Financial (TFC) has just been added to the Russell 1000 Defensive and Russell 1000 Value Defensive Indexes, putting the regional bank on the radar of investors who follow defensive equity benchmarks. headline: UBS Downgrades Truist Financial to Neutral, Lowers Price Target to $55
summary: UBS  analyst Erika Najarian   downgrades Truist Financial (NYSE:TFC) from Buy to Neutral and lowers the price target from $58 to $55.
